quantity: N-limit removal obligation for Schwinger interaction delta

foundation.post_k8_result: The post-K8 K-tail contraction is machine-verified. abs(K_tail at K8-K7) bounded. Remainder bounded for fixed N=4.
foundation.occupation_result: K6/N5 occupation tail classified supports_fixed_N4_continuation; abs N-tail at N5-N4 < support bound.

proof_target.description: For the mass-tuned finite-volume phi^4 Hamiltonian in the zero-total-momentum sector, the free-subtracted Schwinger two-point interaction delta converges as N->inf for each fixed K, and the joint K,N->inf double limit exists and equals the value approached by the K->inf limit at fixed N=4.
proof_target.required_claim: For any eps > 0, there exists N_0(K) such that for all N >= N_0(K), |delta_c0(K,N) - delta_c0(K,N=4)| < eps. Combined with the post-K8 tail bound, this yields |delta_c0(K,N) - delta_c0(inf,inf)| < eps + post_K8_remainder_bound.
key_lemmas_needed: uniform operator norm bound on Fock-space occupation truncation error for each fixed K
monotone N-convergence of the mass-gap counterterm for each fixed K
compatibility of the N-limit with the post-K8 K-tail contraction (commutativity of limits)
absence of occupation-tail resurgence beyond the K6/N5 support bound at higher K

required_certificate_contract.formal_proof_artifact: required under research/proof_certificates with engine label coq or lean4, theorem name n_limit_schwinger_free_subtracted_mass_tuned_joint_removal, non-vacuous convergence statement, successful proof-engine run
required_certificate_contract.machine_verification_report: must be generated by QFT verifier, report status passed, bind obligation hash and certificate hash
required_certificate_contract.certificate_payload_sha256: must be bound by the machine verification report

forbidden_shortcuts: treating finite K6/N5 or K6/N3 occupation evidence as proof of N-limit removal
asserting regulators_removed = True from finite occupation tails alone
promoting the occupation classification to a joint-limit theorem without a verifier-backed proof
marking proof_status proved or certified without a machine-verified formal artifact
no_workaround_status: not achieved; this obligation defines the N-limit target and explicitly keeps K and N as unremoved temporary regulators until both the post-K8 K-tail certificate and this N-limit theorem are independently verified
